mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.job_id, jp.title AS job_title, a.applicant_id, up.real_name AS applicant_name, a.resume_url, a.status, a.apply_time, a.review_time, a.reject_reason FROM application a LEFT JOIN job_post jp ON a.job_id = jp.id LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON a.applicant_id = up.user_id WHERE a.applicant_id = #{applicantId} ORDER BY a.apply_time DESC

SELECT a.id, a.job_id, jp.title AS job_title, a.applicant_id, up.real_name AS applicant_name, a.resume_url, a.status, a.apply_time, a.review_time, a.reject_reason FROM application a LEFT JOIN job_post jp ON a.job_id = jp.id LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON a.applicant_id = up.user_id WHERE a.job_id = #{jobId} ORDER BY a.apply_time DESC

SELECT a.id, a.job_id, jp.title AS job_title, a.applicant_id, up.real_name AS applicant_name, a.resume_url, a.status, a.apply_time, a.review_time, a.reject_reason FROM application a LEFT JOIN job_post jp ON a.job_id = jp.id LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON a.applicant_id = up.user_id ORDER BY a.apply_time DESC
